segment.source: Renders a heading and subheadline above an ordered grid of steps, each with a zero-padded counter (01, 02, 03), a title, and a rich-text description. Use it for: how-it-works sections, numbered process or onboarding steps, ordered lists of advantages or phases found in a document. Prefer 'How-to Steps' for true instructions that need HowTo schema; 'Timeline Feature Section' when steps read chronologically along a connecting line.
